title: Vercel Services: Run full stack on Vercel
summary: Vercel Services: Run full stack on Vercel
whyItMatters: To a user, an app with a Next.js frontend and a FastAPI backend feels like one product, and the same should be true for the engineers who build it. Instead, the two pieces are often deployed across different clouds with different development and deployment workflows. Today we're introducing Vercel Services , which lets you run multiple frameworks in one Ver…
